title: DCPU Tiruchirappalli Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Protection Officer, Supervisor and More Posts
post_name: Project Co-ordinator, Supervisor, Protection Officer (Institutional Care)
short_info: District Child Protection Unit Tiruchirappalli (DCPU Tiruchirappalli) Project Co-ordinator, Supervisor & Protection Officer (Institutional Care) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://tiruchirappalli.nic.in. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the DCPU Tiruchirappalli Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 42 years for all posts. Age relaxation up to 10 years for candidates with prior experience in Emergency Helpline services (only till end of 2025-2026 financial year).

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate degree in Social Work / Sociology / Child Development / Human Rights, Public Administration / Psychology / Psychiatry / Law / Public Health / Community Resource Management; Graduate degree in Social Work / Sociology / Child Development / Human Rights, Public Administration / Psychology / Psychiatry / Law / Public Health / Community Resource Management with 2 years experience; Graduate degree in Social Work / Computer Science / Information Technology / Community Sociology / Social Sciences
qualification.details: Project Co-ordinator: Post Graduate degree in Social Work / Sociology / Child Development / Human Rights, Public Administration / psychology / Psychiatry / Law / Public Health / Community Resource Management from a Recognized University OR Graduate degree in Social Work / Sociology / Child Development / Human Rights, Public Administration / psychology / Psychiatry / Law / Public Health / Community Resource Management from a Recognized University with 2 years experience in project formulation / implementation, monitoring and supervision preferably in the field of Women and Child Development / Social Welfare. Proficiency in Computers. Preference may be given to personnel of working in Emergency Helplines. Supervisor: Graduate degree in Social Work / Computer Science / Information Technology / Community Sociology / Social Sciences from a recognized University. Proficiency in computers. Preference may be given to personnel having experience of working in Emergency Helpline. Protection Officer (Institutional Care): Post Graduate Degree in Social Work / Sociology / Child Development / Human Rights, Public Administration / Psychology / Psychiatry / Public Health / Community Resource Management from a recognized University OR Graduate Degree in Social Work / Sociology / Child Development / Human Rights, Public Administration / Psychology / Psychiatry / Public Health / Community Resource Management from a recognized University with 2 years experience in Project Formulation / Implementation, Monitoring and Supervision preferably in the field of Women and Child Development / Social Welfare. Proficiency in computers.

salary_details.pay_scale: Project Co-ordinator: Rs. 28,000/- per month. Supervisor: Rs. 21,000/- per month.
salary_details.details: Project Co-ordinator: Rs. 28,000/- per month. Supervisor: Rs. 21,000/- per month.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DCPU Tiruchirappalli Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://tiruchirappalli.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 06-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DCPU Tiruchirappalli Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the applications for the DCPU Tiruchirappalli Recruitment 2026 is 06 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the DCPU Tiruchirappalli Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the DCPU Tiruchirappalli Recruitment 2026. These positions are for Project Co-ordinator, Supervisor, and Protection Officer (Institutional Care).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Co-ordinator post?
faq.answer: For the Project Co-ordinator post, candidates need a Post Graduate degree in relevant fields or a Graduate degree with 2 years of experience. Specific details are provided in the eligibility criteria section.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the DCPU Tiruchirappalli Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts in the DCPU Tiruchirappalli Recruitment 2026 is 42 years. Age relaxation is applicable for certain candidates as per the notification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the DCPU Tiruchirappalli Recruitment 2026. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Project Co-ordinator and Supervisor posts?
faq.answer: The salary for the Project Co-ordinator post is Rs. 28,000/- per month, and for the Supervisor post, it is Rs. 21,000/- per month. These are contractual positions.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the DCPU Tiruchirappalli Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q8. What are the selection criteria for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the DCPU Tiruchirappalli Recruitment 2026 includes Application Screening and Document Verification. Candidates will be shortlisted based on these stages.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the District Child Protection Unit Tiruchirappalli, which is https://tiruchirappalli.nic.in.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant educational and experience certificates along with the application form.
